# AGISafe — Pre-deployment safety cases for frontier AI.

> Structured, procurement-ready safety cases for frontier and AGI-class systems — from self-assessment to independent evidence the regulator and your board will accept.

## Overview
AGISafe — Pre-deployment safety cases for frontier AI. is part of the MEOK AI Labs sovereign compliance and attestation platform.
